zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
当前价格运行于7.0004附近，较二十日均线6.93599略高，说明短线仍保持一定多头优势。虽然二十四小时跌幅仅0.32%，但价格始终围绕高低点区间反复震荡，市场观望情绪较浓，趋势暂以震荡偏强看待。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值保持在0轴上方，显示多头动能尚未完全衰减，但由于Signal与RSI数据缺失，动能确认程度有所不足。若后续成交量同步放大，MACD继续走强，则有望推动价格向上测试更高区间。

支撑方面，6.9935附近构成短线第一支撑，若跌破则需关注6.9360附近二十日均线支撑力度；阻力则首先关注7.0227前高位置，若有效放量突破，并站稳其上，短线有机会进一步打开上涨空间。

交易策略上，建议以顺势交易为主，等待价格突破阻力或回踩支撑后的确认信号再择机介入，避免震荡区间内频繁追涨杀跌。同时严格设置止损，合理控制仓位，在趋势尚未完全明朗前保持稳健操作。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading near 7.0004 after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.32%, remaining within a narrow intraday range between 6.9935 and 7.0227. Despite the slight pullback, the price continues to hold above the 20-period simple moving average at 6.93599, suggesting that short-term momentum still favors buyers. The limited daily volatility indicates a market waiting for a stronger catalyst before committing to a more decisive directional move.

The available indicators present a cautiously constructive picture. Although the RSI reading is unavailable, the positive MACD value of 0.037842565 points to underlying bullish momentum, even without the accompanying signal line for confirmation. Traders should interpret this as an early indication of buying strength rather than definitive proof of a sustained uptrend. Continued trading above the moving average would reinforce confidence that buyers retain control over the short-term trend.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around the recent session low near 6.99, with the 20-period SMA around 6.94 serving as a secondary support zone if selling pressure increases. On the upside, resistance begins near the recent high of 7.02, while a convincing break above that level could encourage additional momentum buying and open the path toward higher short-term price objectives. Failure to hold above support may trigger renewed consolidation instead of an immediate reversal.

For active traders, patience remains appropriate until price either confirms a breakout above resistance or produces a clean rebound from support. Momentum-focused participants may consider waiting for increased trading volume before initiating fresh long positions, while risk-conscious traders should maintain disciplined stop-loss placement beneath nearby support levels. Given the relatively tight trading range and mixed confirmation from available indicators, position sizing should remain conservative until stronger directional evidence emerges and broader market sentiment becomes more decisive.
